<!--
Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs focused - one logical change per PR.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full process.
-->

## What does this change?

<!-- A short description of the change and why it's needed. Link any related issue, e.g. "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

<!-- This repo uses Conventional Commits - the PR title/commits drive the release. -->

- [ ] `fix:` - bug fix
- [ ] `feat:` - new user-facing feature
- [ ] `docs:` - documentation only
- [ ] `refactor:` / `perf:` / `style:` - no behaviour change
- [ ] `test:` / `ci:` / `build:` / `chore:` - tooling/maintenance
- [ ] `i18n:` - translation catalog updates
- [ ] Breaking change (`feat!:` / `fix!:` or `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer)

## Checklist

- [ ] My commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] I ran [`./precommit.sh`](https://github.com/Locko2901/lastfm-to-ytm/blob/main/precommit.sh) and it passed (Ruff, Biome, template formatting, both pytest layers, catalogs, structure tree).
- [ ] I added or updated tests for logic changes where practical.
- [ ] I updated the [docs](https://locko2901.github.io/lastfm-to-ytm/) if behaviour or configuration changed.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal data are included in this PR.
